revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-3-545

Luneberg reflector

A reflector making use of a number of concentric dielectric spheres of varying refractive index, capable of focusing incident energy onto a reflecting surface. The energy is eventually re-radiated along the incident path.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Luneberg lens}}
